class.name: CassieInputStroke
class.brief_description: Raw sample buffer for a single freehand sketch stroke.
class.description:
Holds the positions, timestamps, and pressures captured during one stroke (a single trigger press in XR, or a single mouse drag on flatscreen) and exposes the pre-fit utilities used by the CASSIE beautifier: temporal-ablation safe-point extraction, G1-continuity sectioning, RDP-based polyline simplification, and stroke validity checks.
Feed it samples as they come in via [method add_sample], then hand the resulting resource to the beautifier or call [method get_points] for a quick fitter-ready polyline.

method.name: add_sample
method.description: Appends a sample. The running stroke length is updated to include the chord to the previous sample.

method.name: average_drawing_speed
method.description: Returns total stroke length divided by elapsed creation time, or [code]0.0[/code] when fewer than two samples or zero elapsed time.

method.name: clear
method.description: Removes all samples and resets the running length to zero.

method.name: get_g1_sections
method.description: Splits the temporally-safe sample list at angular discontinuities and trims short hook segments at both ends. Returns an array of [PackedVector3Array] sections, one per G1-continuous piece.

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the total chord length of the stroke.

method.name: get_points
method.description: Returns all sample positions in order. If [param rdp_error] is non-zero, the result is reduced by the Ramer-Douglas-Peucker algorithm using that tolerance.

method.name: get_safe_points
method.description: Returns the sample positions after dropping any sample whose creation time is within [param ablation_duration] of the stroke's start or end. Endpoint samples are always kept. If the ablation window would empty the result, all sample positions are returned instead.

method.name: get_sample_count
method.description: Returns the number of samples currently in the buffer.

method.name: get_weights
method.description: Returns the per-sample pressure values in order.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] only when there are at least two samples and either the stroke took longer than [param min_sketching_time] or the bounding span exceeds [param min_stroke_size]. Catches accidental clicks.
